caption: A man with dark hair and a blue button-down shirt, featuring a small logo on the chest that reads "NFOOBJECTS", is speaking while wearing a headset microphone. He is positioned in front of a light-colored backdrop that displays the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". In the first frame, a small graphic in the lower left reads "SPONSORED BY" above the "NFOOBJECTS" logo. A dark folder or notebook rests on the table in front of him. As the video progresses, the man continues to speak, with subtle changes in his facial expressions and head position. By the final frames, a blue banner appears across the bottom of the screen with the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" and "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room San Jose, CA," alongside a logo for "#BigDataSV 2015" and a blue cube graphic.
